calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Advanced From Jul-02-10 To Jun-17-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Advanced From Jun-30-10 To Jun-15-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Ivy P. Tseng, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mission Bay North Financing, L.P.
Robert Blaskey, Senior Customer Service Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Dolly Ganguly.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 4, 2010. Notice resent on June 18, 2010 setting trial for today, June 21, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Apartment Lease Agreement signed 09/28/09................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 01/14/10......................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--3--Proof of Service of Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit.................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mission Bay North Financing, L.P., and against defendant Dolly Ganguly as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $5,632.00.
Holdover Damages - $13,187.73.
Attorney Fees - $400.00.
Costs - $280.00.

Total - $19,499.73.

Additionally, plaintiff Mission Bay North Financing, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 383 King Street, #1512, San Francisco, CA. 94158. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
